name: Meatballs En Croute
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons minced green or red pepper
1 tablespoon flour and 2 tablespoons cold water
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the egg, bread crumbs, minced vegetables, and seasonings in a mixing bowl.
2. Add ground beef and mix thoroughly to combine.
3. Form into 3/4-inch balls.
4. Heat olive oil and butter in a medium frying pan over medium heat.
5. Add meatballs to the pan; shake occasionally and turn to brown all sides and cook through, about 5 minutes. Allow to cool completely. This can be done ahead of time and refrigerated until ready to use.
6. Roll each meatball in barbecue sauce.
7. Place a meatball in the center of a won ton wrapper.
8. Fold the corner over the meatball and brush the remaining corners with lightly beaten egg white or a mixture of 1 tablespoon flour and 2 tablespoons cold water.
9. Wrap the meatball by bringing the corners up and sealing them to each other, forming a pinwheel shape. Repeat for all meatballs.
10. Deep fry 3 or 4 wrapped meatballs at a time in batches for 2 to 3 minutes, turning occasionally until browned on all sides.
11. Drain on paper towels.
12. Serve with sour cream, chives, and dill for a Swedish taste.
